message:
feat(abi): native res_init resolver bootstrap + Send impl for HashSlot

Two targeted improvements:

- unistd_abi.rs: Replace glibc-callthrough res_init with native implementation
  that parses /etc/resolv.conf using frankenlibc_core::resolv::ResolverConfig.
  Silently succeeds if config is missing/unreadable (glibc-compatible behavior).
  Eliminates one more GlibcCallThrough symbol. Includes basic unit test
  (res_init_reports_success).

- search_abi.rs: Add unsafe Send impl for HashSlot to satisfy thread-safety
  requirements. The raw pointers in HashSlot are C-owned and only accessed
  under Mutex, making this sound.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
